calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Set For Trial On May-01-24 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Continued To May-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for small claims appeal and trial de novo.

Dept. 306; Judge Daniel A. Flores; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:58:18 a.m. and concluding at 12:06:29 a.m.

Respondent/Plaintiff KSH Automotive, Inc. appearing by Kirill Shabelsky, Owner appearing in pro per.

Appellant/Defendant Robert Naboyev appearing in pro per. Defendant is assisted by a Russian Language Interpreter, Tatiana Iacona; Certification No. 301252.

KIRILL SHABELSKY and MAKSIM ARBISMAN are sworn to testify on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff.
ROBERT NABOYEV is sworn to testify on behalf of Appellant/Defendant.

Appellant/Defendant testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit A - E-mail to KSH Automotive, Inc. dated Dec-06-2023
Exhibit B - 7 Pictures of the Exterior of the Vehicle

Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on his/her own behalf.

COURT FINDS THAT NOTICE REGARDING STORAGE FEES WAS NOT CLEARLY DEFINED. STORAGE FEES FOR THE MONTH OF OCTOBER SHALL NOT BE AWARDED.

COURT FURTHER FINDS STORAGE FEES OF $165 A DAY IS REASONABLE.
Court finds in favor of Respondent/Plaintiff KSH Automotive, Inc. and against Appellant/Defendant Robert Naboyev.

JUDGMENT IS ORDERED in favor of KSH Automotive, Inc. and against Robert Naboyev in the amount of $6,250.00 PRINCIPAL; $0 ATTORNEY FEES; $0 COSTS; $0 INTEREST; $0 SPECIFY for a TOTAL OF $6,250.00

Mr. Naboyev may alternatively execute and deliver the pink slip to the subject vehicle to KSH Automotive, Inc. on May-02-2024 by 12 Noon. KSH Automotive, Inc. may begin charging daily storage fees, again, on May-02-2024 if the vehicle remains in the shop.

JUDGMENT ON CROSS CLAIM IS NOT ORDERED
Court adjourns.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Continued To May-01-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 306

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Judgment Entered
